risk_note.tr: Adimlar Microsoft Learn 'Fast startup causes hibernation or shutdown to fail' belgesinden alinmistir. Microsoft notu: 'Fast Startup is enabled by default in Windows, and disabling Fast Startup is not recommended.' Sadece dual-boot, donanim degisikligi, surekli shutdown sorunu gibi durumlarda kapatin.
risk_note.en: Steps sourced from Microsoft Learn 'Fast startup causes hibernation or shutdown to fail'. Microsoft note: 'Fast Startup is enabled by default in Windows, and disabling Fast Startup is not recommended.' Disable only for dual-boot, hardware swap, persistent shutdown issues.

body.tr: 'Fast Startup is a setting that helps the computer start faster after shutdown, with Windows saving the kernel session and device drivers to the hibernate file instead of closing them when you shut down the computer.' Yani sistem aslinda 'sahte shutdown' yapar - hibernate dosyasina kernel state'i kaydeder.
body.en: 'Fast Startup is a setting that helps the computer start faster after shutdown, with Windows saving the kernel session and device drivers to the hibernate file instead of closing them when you shut down the computer.' It's effectively a 'fake shutdown' that saves kernel state to hibernate file.

body.tr: 1) Start'a tikla, arama kutusuna 'Power' yaz. 2) 'Power Options' veya 'Choose what the power buttons do' sec. 3) Pencereninn ustunde 'Change settings that are currently unavailable' linkine tikla (UAC promptu cikar). 4) Sayfa asagisinda 'Shutdown settings' altinda 'Turn on fast startup (recommended)' kutusunun isaretini kaldir. 5) 'Save changes' tikla.
body.en: 1) Click Start, type 'Power' in search. 2) Select 'Power Options' or 'Choose what the power buttons do'. 3) At top of window click 'Change settings that are currently unavailable' (UAC prompt). 4) Under 'Shutdown settings', uncheck 'Turn on fast startup (recommended)'. 5) Click 'Save changes'.

title.tr: Alternatif: powercfg ile hibernation kapatma (Fast Startup'i da kapatir)
title.en: Alternative: disable hibernation via powercfg (also disables Fast Startup)

body.tr: Registry Editor'da HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Session Manager\Power yoluna git. HiberbootEnabled DWORD'unu 0 yap. Microsoft Q&A'larda alternatif olarak onerilir.
body.en: In Registry Editor navigate to HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Session Manager\Power. Set HiberbootEnabled DWORD to 0. Recommended in Microsoft Q&As as alternative.

body.tr: Microsoft notu: dual-boot sistemler (sahte shutdown linux mount'i bozar), BIOS guncellemesi yapacak, donanim degistirecekseniz, shutdown calismiyorsa. Aksi halde Microsoft Fast Startup'i acik birakmayi onerir.
body.en: Microsoft note: dual-boot systems (fake shutdown breaks Linux mounts), planning BIOS update or hardware swap, shutdown not working. Otherwise Microsoft recommends keeping Fast Startup enabled.
